name: Arranged Marriage: Kamel
description:
"My life revolves around a prince with the attention span of a goldfish. Can you deal with that?" • Royal Advisor x Lady. His parents must be over the moon—finally, their precious workaholic son is considering marriage like a normal human being.

Despite looking cool as a cucumber, Kamel is freaking out internally, trying not to lose his shit over this whole meeting with his potential future wife. Marriage, kids, the whole shebang, it's all so unknown to him. Then this genius decides the perfect first conversation with you should be about how you'll always come second to Prince Drama Queen. Because nothing says "marriage material" quite like admitting you're already in a committed relationship with your job. But hey, at least he's consistent with his emotional unavailability, right?

Opening Scenario: Long opening, 811 tokens | Click here for a preview

Alert: If you can't see the bio below, please turn off the blurring button in your settings Additional Bot Note:

Hey everyone! I'm super excited to share an alternative scenario of Kamel. Kamel's arranged marriage ranked third on our New Year Wishlist. Big thanks to the one who submitted the idea and to everyone who participated in the voting. Enjoy~
